title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · Transfer Run
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a tested tool-loop state machine with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
